name: Operations/import-search
description: Search-parameter indexing conformance tests for composite, date, number, and quantity searches, created via standard REST create/update as an $import-independent equivalent of the ImportXSearchTests suites (Part 1 of 2; see import-search-2.json for reference/string/token/uri).

resource.valueString: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet consectetur adipiscing elit. Vestibulum quis molestie dui.

operation.description: PUT Observation comp-temp-high (LOINC 8310-5 body temperature = 39.1 Cel)
PUT Observation comp-temp-normal (LOINC 8310-5 body temperature = 37.0 Cel)
PUT Observation comp-eyecolor (SNOMED 162806009 eye color = blue)
PUT Observation comp-eyecolor-long (SNOMED 162806009 eye color = long Lorem-ipsum value)
PUT Observation comp-bp (blood pressure panel, systolic/diastolic components)
PUT Observation comp-apgarcolor (Apgar score, component color=coded concept)
PUT Observation date-0 (effectiveDateTime=1979-06-15, day precision, in 1979 (before 1980))
PUT Observation date-1 (effectiveDateTime=1980, year precision, covers all of 1980)
PUT Observation date-2 (effectiveDateTime=1980-05, month precision, covers May 1980)
PUT Observation date-3 (effectiveDateTime=1980-05-11, day precision, a single day in May 1980)
PUT Observation date-4 (effectiveDateTime=1980-05-11T16:32:15, datetime precision, a single second on 1980-05-11)
PUT Observation date-5 (effectiveDateTime=1981-11-20, day precision, in 1981)
PUT Patient num-subj (subject referenced by the RiskAssessment fixtures)

test.name: Composite code-value-quantity: body temperature > 38 Cel
test.description: Observation?code-value-quantity=http://loinc.org|8310-5$gt38|http://unitsofmeasure.org|Cel composites the top-level code and valueQuantity. comp-temp-high (39.1 Cel) must match; comp-temp-normal (37.0 Cel) must not.

assert.description: Must NOT include comp-temp-normal (37.0 Cel, not > 38)

test.name: Composite code-value-string: eye color matches a starts-with value
test.description: Observation?code-value-string=162806009$Lorem composites Observation.code (bare code, any system) with a starts-with match on valueString. comp-eyecolor-long (Lorem ipsum...) must match; comp-eyecolor (blue) must not.

assert.description: Must include comp-eyecolor-long (valueString starts with Lorem)

test.name: Composite combo-code-value-quantity: component code+value must come from the same component
test.description: Observation?combo-code-value-quantity composites a code (top-level or component) with a Quantity value from the SAME focus. comp-bp's systolic component (LOINC 8480-6 = 120 mmHg) matches 8480-6$120; it must NOT match 8480-6$80 (that value belongs to the diastolic component, a different focus).

assert.description: Must include comp-bp (systolic 8480-6=120 in the same component)
Must NOT include comp-bp (8480-6 code paired with the diastolic component's value)

test.name: Composite combo-code-value-concept: component code+coded-value pair
test.description: Observation?combo-code-value-concept composites a component code with a component valueCodeableConcept. comp-apgarcolor's color component (SNOMED 249227004 = http://acme.ped/apgarcolor|2) must match that exact pair, and must not match a different coded value under the same code.

assert.description: Must NOT include comp-apgarcolor (component is coded 2, not 1)

test.name: Composite relationship: DocumentReference relatesTo code+target
test.description: DocumentReference?relationship=DocumentReference/{id}$code composites relatesTo.target with relatesTo.code. comp-docref-b relatesTo comp-docref-a with code 'appends'; it must match $appends and must not match $replaces.

assert.description: Must NOT include comp-docref-b (relatesTo code is appends, not replaces)

test.name: Date: year-precision search matches any resource whose range falls within that year
test.description: Observation?date=1980 matches date-1 (year 1980 itself), date-3 (day in May 1980), and date-6 (period entirely within May 1980). date-0 (1979) and date-5 (1981) must not match.

test.name: Date: day-precision search matches overlapping coarser-precision resources
test.description: Observation?date=1980-05-11 matches any resource whose range overlaps that day, including coarser-precision resources that contain it: date-1 (year), date-2 (month), date-3 (exact day), date-4 (datetime same day). date-0, date-5, and date-6 (different days) must not match.

assert.description: Must include date-4 (datetime on the same day)
Must NOT include date-6 (period is May 16-17, a different day)

test.name: Date: lt prefix matches resources starting strictly before the given day
test.description: Observation?date=lt1980-05-11 matches resources whose range starts before 1980-05-11: date-0 (1979), date-1 (year 1980 starts Jan 1), date-2 (month 1980-05 starts May 1). date-3 (the day itself) and date-6 (starts May 16, after) must not match.

assert.description: Must include date-1 (year 1980 starts before May 11)
Must include date-2 (month 1980-05 starts before May 11)
Must NOT include date-3 (the day itself, not strictly before)
Must NOT include date-6 (starts May 16, after)

test.name: Date: ge prefix matches resources overlapping on/after the given instant
test.description: Observation?date=ge1981-01-01 matches date-5 (1981-11-20, after). date-1 (1980, ends Dec 31 1980) and date-6 (period ends 1980-05-17) must not match.

assert.description: Must NOT include date-1 (1980, ends before 1981)

test.name: Number: implicit/eq prefix matches only the exact value
test.description: RiskAssessment?probability=5 (implicit eq) matches only num-2 (probability=5); num-1 (4) and num-3 (6) must not match.

test.name: Number: gt prefix matches strictly greater values
test.description: RiskAssessment?probability=gt5 matches num-3 (6) and num-4 (100); num-2 (5) and num-0 (1) must not match.

test.name: Number: le prefix matches values less than or equal
test.description: RiskAssessment?probability=le5 matches num-0 (1), num-1 (4), and num-2 (5); num-3 (6) must not match.

test.name: Number: ne prefix excludes only the exact value
test.description: RiskAssessment?probability=ne5 matches num-0 (1) and num-3 (6); num-2 (5) must not match.

test.name: Quantity: bare number matches regardless of unit/system
test.description: Observation?value-quantity=5 matches qty-3 (5 unit1/system1) and qty-4 (5 unit2/system2) since no unit/system is specified; qty-2 (4.0) must not match.

test.name: Quantity: system-qualified value narrows to the matching system
test.description: Observation?value-quantity=5|system1 matches only qty-3 (5, system1); qty-4 (5, system2) must not match even though the numeric value is the same.

test.name: Quantity: unit-qualified value (no system) narrows to the matching unit code
test.description: Observation?value-quantity=5||unit2 matches only qty-4 (5, unit2); qty-3 (5, unit1) must not match.

test.name: Quantity: gt prefix matches strictly greater values
test.description: Observation?value-quantity=gt4.9 matches qty-3 (5), qty-4 (5), qty-5 (6), and qty-6 (10); qty-2 (4.0) and qty-1 (1.0) must not match.
